notes: Very dense STM32H7 block diagram with multiple bus matrices, frequency-domain labels, memory/cache blocks, DMA controllers, timers, analog peripherals, communication peripherals, and power/clock/reset blocks.
Includes many external edge labels, nested blocks, vertical buses, angled bus-matrix polygons, small colored tags, SRAM callouts, and packed repeated peripheral rows.
Useful for validating dense routing, small text, mixed rect/polygon bus shapes, nested CPU/cache/memory components, vertical labels, and complex left/right diagram-edge terminals.
